src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.general_idea: Removed assertions checking for specific API definition options in the HTML index page, likely because the UI structure changed or these checks were deemed brittle/unnecessary during the migration.
src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.human_impl: Removed lines checking for 'Core API', 'Workflow API', etc. options in indexPageContent.

src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.general_idea: Added a new test method to validate the newly introduced Model API definition (alfresco-model.yaml/json).
src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.human_impl: Added testModelDefinition() method and validateModelDefn() helper to check for 'swagger:' and '/aspects' path.

src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.general_idea: Updated the expected count of API definitions in the index to reflect the addition of the Model API.
src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.human_impl: Changed assertEquals expected value from 12 to 14.

src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.general_idea: Cleaned up trailing whitespace in the test file.
src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.human_impl: Removed trailing spaces on empty lines.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source, target, and release properties from Java 11 to Java 17 to enforce the new JDK baseline.
Bump the swagger-ui webjar dependency version from 3.37.0 to 3.38.0.
Add exclusion for .map files in the maven-dependency-plugin to prevent unpacking source maps into the swagger directory.
Update SCM connection URLs from SSH to HTTPS and fix the repository URL format.
Update distribution management repository IDs and URLs to use public Alfresco Nexus repositories.
Simplify Jetty plugin configuration by removing fork execution and adding scan interval setting.
Remove Bamboo-specific build metadata entries from the WAR manifest archive configuration.

README.md.general_idea: Add a badge linking to the GitHub Actions CI workflow status.
Add a badge indicating that pre-commit hooks are enabled.
Add a badge displaying the GitHub license information.
Update the copyright year range to reflect the current project timeline.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add 'storage-info' tag to the OpenAPI specification to categorize storage-related endpoints.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added '- name: storage-info' under the tags section.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add 'categories' tag to the OpenAPI specification to categorize category-related endpoints.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added '- name: categories' under the tags section.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Define 'nodeFolderIdParam' for identifying folder nodes in path parameters.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added 'nodeFolderIdParam' definition with nodeId path parameter.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add 'isDirectLinkEnabled' as an includable field for node entries.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added '* isDirectLinkEnabled' to the include lists for nodeMinimalEntryIncludeParam, nodeEntryIncludeParam, and nodePagingIncludeParam.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Define 'categoryEntryIncludeParam' for including additional category information like count and path.
Define 'categoryEntryIncludePathParam' for including path information in category entries.
Define 'categoryIdParam' for identifying categories in path parameters.
Clarify the description of the 'attachment' parameter to remove ambiguous download restrictions.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Changed description from '...but not download the file' to '...in a new tab or window.'

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Define 'contentPropNameParam' for specifying content property names in paths.
Define 'parameterConstraintNameParam' for specifying action parameter constraint names.
Standardize 400 error descriptions for tag endpoints to be more generic.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Changed specific invalid parameter descriptions to 'An invalid parameter has been supplied.'

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add 400 error response to the delete tag endpoint.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added '400: An invalid parameter has been supplied.' to DELETE /tags/{tagId}.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add endpoint to list categories assigned to a specific node.
Add endpoint to assign a node to one or more categories.
Add endpoint to unassign a node from a specific category.
Clarify overwrite behavior for non-versionable files in node content upload.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added note: 'It is not possible to overwrite an existing file which is not versionable.'

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Remove misleading statement about majorVersion enabling versioning automatically.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Removed 'Setting majorVersion enables versioning of the node, if it is not already versioned.'

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add 412 error response for archived content in node content retrieval.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added '412: Content is archived and is inaccessible' to GET /nodes/{nodeId}/content.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add endpoint to generate a direct access URL for a node's content.
Add endpoint to delete a specific rendition of a node.
Add 412 error response for archived content in rendition content retrieval.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added '412: Content is archived and is inaccessible' to GET /nodes/{nodeId}/renditions/{renditionId}/content.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add endpoint to generate a direct access URL for a node's rendition.
Add 412 error response for archived content in version content retrieval.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added '412: Content is archived and is inaccessible' to GET /nodes/{nodeId}/versions/{versionId}/content.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add endpoint to generate a direct access URL for a specific version's content.
Add endpoint to delete a rendition associated with a specific version.
Add 412 error response for archived content in version rendition content retrieval.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added '412: Content is archived and is inaccessible' to GET /nodes/{nodeId}/versions/{versionId}/renditions/{renditionId}/content.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add endpoint to generate a direct access URL for a specific version's rendition.
Add API endpoints to retrieve, archive, and restore content storage properties for cloud connectors.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added paths '/nodes/{nodeId}/storage-info/...' and '/nodes/{nodeId}/versions/.../storage-info/...' with GET and POST operations.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add API endpoint to generate direct access URLs for deleted nodes.
Add API endpoint to generate direct access URLs for renditions of deleted nodes.
Mark password reset endpoints as deprecated in the API definition.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Correct syntax error in the example query parameter for site membership requests.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Changed 'where=(siteId=mySite AND personId=person))' to 'where=(siteId=mySite AND personId=person)' in description.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add sorting and filtering capabilities to the list tags endpoint.
Add full CRUD operations for tags including create, get, update, and delete.
Add full CRUD operations for categories including create, get, update, delete, and subcategory listing.
Add HTTP 412 Precondition Failed response to shared links endpoints to indicate archived content.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Correct missing closing parentheses in API documentation examples for query parameters.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Changed `BETWEEN ('...', '...')` to `BETWEEN ('...', '...'))` in multiple audit endpoint descriptions.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add new endpoint to retrieve action parameter constraints by name.
Remove additionalProperties from Capabilities definition to restrict schema structure.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Removed `additionalProperties: type: string` from the `Capabilities` definition.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add new schema definitions for Categories and Tags including paging and entry structures.
Remove explicit 'required: false' from SiteMembershipRequestBodyUpdate property.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add isDirectLinkEnabled property to SharedLink definition.
Add new schema definitions for Direct Access URLs.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add new schema definitions for Action Constraints.

Add new schema definition for Action Execution Template.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add new schema definitions for Content Storage and Archiving.
Add new schema definitions for Composite and Simple Conditions.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-dis.general_idea: Add isCustomEmbeddedWorkflowEnabled field to the API definition to expose custom embedded workflow capability status.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-sea.general_idea: Correct inconsistent indentation in YAML definitions to ensure valid parsing and structure.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-sea.general_idea: Repair broken markdown syntax in API documentation descriptions.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-sea.general_idea: Provide a concrete example for the RequestPivot definition.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-sea.general_idea: Correct a typo in a YAML comment.

src/main/webapp/index.html.general_idea: Update the HTML title to reflect the specific product name instead of the generic framework name.
Remove unnecessary whitespace and newlines in CSS selectors for compactness.
Hide the Swagger UI error wrapper element using CSS to improve visual presentation.
Include the Model API definition in the Swagger UI dropdown list.
Enable the display of request duration in the Swagger UI interface.
